=== Bob Dylan 16 Oct 1990, New York.txt
===================
===================
===================
The Beacon Theatre, New York City, New York, October 16, 1990 

Size:493MB 

Trade > CDR > Wav > FLAC(Level:8) 

JF recording

Time : 73:58

01.  Dixie (Daniel Decatur Emmett)
02.  Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine)
03.  Man In The Long Black Coat
04.  Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter)
05.  T.V. Talkin' Song
06.  Under The Red Sky
07.  Wiggle Wiggle
08.  It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
09.  One Too Many Mornings
10.  Two Soldiers (trad.)
11.  Mr. Tambourine Man
12.  Everything Is Broken
13.  Joey (Bob Dylan & Jacques Levy)
14.  Positively 4th Street
15.  All Along The Watchtower
16.  Like A Rolling Stone
17.  Blowin' In The Wind
18.  Highway 61 Revisited
 

Concert # 238 of The Never-Ending Tour.  Concert # 5 of the 1990 USA Fall Tour. 1990 concert # 68.
Concert # 160 with the second Never-Ending Tour band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), G. E. Smith (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Christopher Parker (drums).
1-3  John Staehely (guitar), Cesar Diaz (guitar).
4-7, 12-16, 18  Cesar Diaz (guitar).
8-11, 17 acoustic with Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), G.E. Smith (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Christopher Parker (drums).
4, 6, 9-11, 14, 16  Bob Dylan harmonica.
1  short instrumental.
18  G.E. Smith (electric slide guitar).
